Projects.Name: Routine Tracker
Projects.Description: A web application that helps users track their daily routines and habits. It allows users to create and manage their routines, set reminders, and visualize their progress over time.

Projects.Name: Student Interaction Website
Projects.Description: A platform for students to interact with each other and with instructors. It includes features like discussion forums, assignment submission, and grade tracking.

Projects.Name: Dental clinic Website
Projects.Description: It was a frontend UI created using Html CSS.
